plugins.name: kipi-core
plugins.description: Core founder OS skills (voice, research, AUDHD, linkedin-brand)

plugins.name: prd-os
plugins.description: PRD lifecycle: draft, Codex review, triage, approve, split into atomic issues, execute with scope enforcement

plugins.name: kipi-dsse
plugins.description: DSSE issue execution: scope-enforced edits, Codex review gates, per-finding dispositions. Consumes issue specs from prd-os or manual drops.

plugins.name: kipi-notebooklm
plugins.description: NotebookLM MCP wrapper (browser automation via Patchright). Personal gmail profile. Ask questions, ingest sources, generate audio overviews.
